roles.name: Writer
roles.description: Role that can create new posts and edit their own posts.

roles.name: Editor
roles.description: Role that has the ability to edit and publish all content.

roles.name: Content Admin
roles.description: Role with full rights to edit all content. Useful for simple sites or those without publishing approval workflows.

policies.name: Content - Live Preview
policies.description: Grants read access to all pages and posts. Used for Live Preview so you can preview draft content. Be careful not to expose tokens of users with this policy.

policies.name: Team - App Access
policies.description: Grants Directus Studio access to team members

policies.name: Content - Manage
policies.description: Grants ability to read and edit ALL content.

policies.name: Content - Self
policies.description: Grants user ability to ONLY edit their own content. Cannot publish content.

policies.name: Forms - Submission
policies.description: Grants ability to create form submissions. Used in frontend.
